channel.title: Akshat Gada — Writing
channel.description: Notes on agentic payments, x402, and the machine-payable web — what I'm building at Polygon, and what I think is coming.

item.title: x402 just grew up
item.description: The Linux Foundation launched the x402 Foundation — with Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, Google, AWS, Coinbase and 30+ others as founding members, Polygon Labs among them. We've been building on x402 at Polygon since last year; why an open, community-governed standard for payments over HTTP changes everything for agentic payments.

item.title: Cloudflare just turned on the meter
item.description: Cloudflare's Monetization Gateway puts an x402 paywall in front of a fifth of the web — charge for any page, API, dataset, or MCP tool, per request, settled in stablecoins. The starting gun for the agent economy, and exactly what we've been building at Polygon with the facilitator, the Agent CLI, and Agentic Services.
